title: Palm Springs Mid-Century Gallery Wall Set | Retro Desert Oasis Prints | Breezeblock & Poolside Digital Download
description:
Transport your living space to a sun-drenched 1960s desert oasis. This curated six-piece gallery wall collection captures the iconic mid-century modern aesthetic of Palm Springs, featuring crisp breezeblock geometry, lush poolside botanicals, and warm terracotta sunshine. Perfect for adding a sophisticated, retro-chic vibe to your living room, bedroom, or entryway.

Instantly download, print, and frame. You will receive 6 high-resolution (300 DPI) digital art prints, each provided in 5 scalable size ratios to ensure a flawless fit for over 20 standard frame sizes. Whether you want a statement centerpiece or a sprawling eclectic layout, this set is designed for effortless coordination.

Your purchase includes a comprehensive PDF printing guide to help you achieve gallery-quality results at home or through your favorite professional print shop. Please note: this is a premium digital download; no physical product will be shipped.
